title: MegaBeaconBeams
description: The mod unites a lot of beams from adjacent beacons into a MEGABEAM. Oh, if you have really many beacons it will improve your fps.
body:
### **The mod unites many beacon beams into one Mega-Beam.**
This mod will increase your fps if you have so many beacons nearby, because your pc will render only 1 beam instead of rendering 100+ beams at the same time.

![Shows: before using this mod and after using this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a14f5ba78f0fd1d1c962695552204b4689c1171.gif)

To create Mega-Beam you should place a square of beacons and activate them, for example, 2×2 or 3×3, etc.
You can also edit size and style of Mega-Beams. There are 3 styles of Mega-Beams:

Default:

![default style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae58914ccbed98da87815434196f9e677e14a967.png) 

Old:

![old style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b167939efc4f5f239e038001f62070304adb9be.png) 

Multy:

![multy style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b1745f0f8cd0ff5a9da118e962801a3470512a8.png)
